くぅ……どこに行ったんだ、アタシのぬいぐるみ～。<br>買ったばかりのお気に入り:
Guh... Where did my plushie go? I just bought it and it was my
favorite...
アタシがぬいぐるみを持っているなど知れたら、みんなを幻滅させてしまうし、<br>:
If anyone found out I had a plushie, they'd be disappointed in me. I
can't talk to anyone about it... Wh-what am I supposed to do...
そ、そうか。アタシが、好きそうなぬいぐるみが落ちていたから、<br>もしやと思っ:
I-I see... So you saw a plushie you thought I'd like lying around and
brought it to me...
うぅぅ……！ よかったぁ……！ もう二度と手放さないからなぁ～～！<br>兄さん:
Ooh... I'm so glad... I'll never let it go again! And Brother, thank you!
I'll never forget this kindness...
